bio: Petunia first arrived in our area in April 2025. She’s incredibly friendly, so we believe she was once someone’s pet. It took her a little time to find a safe space, but she now has a regular spot and absolutely loves her food and being petted by the feeders. She’s very affectionate and likes to follow us around … even crossing the road at times, which can be a little nerve‑wracking!.
location: Usually in front of The Pavilion, Cluster P.
